jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at ASCI
jsonLd.description:
Join the ASCI family as a Instructional Designer in Kolkata. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About ASCI:
ASCI is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Content Creation
• Proficiency in Student Assessment
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in Communication Skills
• Proficiency in Research Skills
• Proficiency in Special Education

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Kolkata, West Bengal, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with ASCI!
